products.name: EltaMD UV Clear Broad-Spectrum SPF 46
products.tagline: Dermatologist-recommended face sunscreen that works under makeup
products.what_it_is: A lightweight chemical/mineral hybrid SPF 46 face sunscreen with niacinamide, designed for acne-prone and sensitive skin.
products.best_for: Daily face protection, especially for oily, acne-prone, or sensitive skin.
products.stands_out: One of the most recommended sunscreens by dermatologists; no white cast and layers well under makeup.
products.before_you_buy: Pricier than most options — factor that in if using head-to-toe.
products.skip_if: You want a budget daily option or prefer a purely mineral formula.

products.name: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch SPF 100+
products.tagline: Body and face sunscreen with a matte, non-greasy finish
products.what_it_is: A water-resistant chemical sunscreen in SPF 100+ — one of the top-selling sunscreens in the US.
products.best_for: Body coverage during outdoor activities; daily face use for those who prefer chemical formulas.
products.stands_out: The dry-touch finish stays matte even in heat. Wide availability makes it easy to restock.
products.before_you_buy: Contains oxybenzone, which some prefer to avoid for skin sensitivity or reef concerns.
products.skip_if: You have sensitive skin or want a reef-safe or mineral-only formula.

products.name: Blue Lizard Mineral Sunscreen SPF 50+
products.tagline: Mineral-only formula safe for sensitive skin and reef ecosystems
products.what_it_is: A broad-spectrum mineral sunscreen using zinc oxide and titanium dioxide, water-resistant for 80 minutes.
products.best_for: Sensitive skin, kids, people who prefer mineral-only formulas, or those concerned about reef safety.
products.stands_out: Bottle cap turns blue in UV light — useful reminder to reapply. Fragrance-free and paraben-free.
products.before_you_buy: Mineral formulas can leave a slight white cast on deeper skin tones.
products.skip_if: You dislike the texture of mineral sunscreens or need something that disappears instantly.
